author: mark
text: stash artifact at `wip/bl-e802-stash` (commit 30f79c5) added `Store::synthesize_xdg_config()` to src/store.rs — the transitional `Config`-shaped view of RepoJson + ProjectConfig that this phase retires. Reading the function tells you which fields the 15+ `load_config()` call sites actually need from the synthesized struct (mostly `worktree_dir`, `integrate.mode`, `review.gate_command`, the three `require_remote_on_*` flags). Useful as a checklist of which EffectiveConfig accessors to mint when rewriting the call sites.
